title: aristolochia longa subsp. paucinervis
intro: Aristolochia longa subsp. paucinervis, also known as the Chinese snake root, is a plant species in the Aristolochia genus, which belongs to the Aristolochiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aristolochia longa subsp. paucinervis include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of certain diseases. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity concerns.
